title: hedychloe fragrans
intro: Hedychloe fragrans, also known as the Sweet Box, is a small, evergreen shrub native to Australia and Tasmania. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hedychloe fragrans include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
